surface_treatment.upload_zone: relative border-2 border-dashed border-white/10 bg-[#0D111D] rounded-3xl p-12 hover:border-[#4F46E5]/50 transition-colors duration-300

navbar.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#03040B]/80 border-b border-white/[0.02]
navbar.instructions: Must contain the Nexorium logo on the left, primary navigation links in the center, and the Profile icon (trigger for Shadcn Sheet) on the top right.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(79,70,229,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(79,70,229,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0D111D] border border-white/10 hover:bg-[#1A2133] hover:border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.wallet: flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#F6851B]/10 border border-[#F6851B]/20 text-[#F6851B] hover:bg-[#F6851B]/20 rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

profile_drawer.instructions: Use Shadcn Sheet. Overlay should be black/60 backdrop-blur-sm. Inside: User Avatar (initials, large, rounded-full bg-indigo-600), Name, Email, Wallet Address (mono), Stats (Bento style grid for Total Assets and NFTs). Include close button.

data_table.instructions: Use Shadcn Table. No default stripes. Rows have border-b border-white/5. Hover state on rows: bg-white/[0.02]. Column headers: mono_label style. Badges for status: Processing (yellow/10 text-yellow-500), Completed (emerald/10 text-emerald-500).

input_fields.instructions: Shadcn Input. bg-[#0D111D] border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-xl px-4 py-6

animations.page_load: framer-motion initial opacity-0 y-4, animate opacity-1 y-0 stagger 0.1s
animations.drawer: slide in from right, smooth spring physics

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D geometric glass shapes floating in deep dark midnight space, elegant dark blue and violet lighting. Use as an ambient, low-opacity background for the Hero or Authentication views.

texture_background.description: Dark textured carbon fiber or matte black paper. Use as the base texture for main dashboard cards (opacity 20% mixed with dark solid color) or page background to kill digital flatness.

auth_visual.description: Metallic dark obsidian shield with subtle glowing neon blue edge. Use this in the Verification page or empty states to signify security.

pages_and_flows.layout: Global Layout: Glass Navbar at top. Main content area with top padding pt-24.

dashboard.structure: Header with 'Your Digital Assets' (H1) and primary action 'Register New IP'. Stats overview at the top (bento grid style: 3 cards). Below: Assets Data Table with search bar (Shadcn Input) and filter dropdown.
dashboard.state: Empty state should use auth_visual image, small, with 'No assets registered yet'.

register_asset.structure: Stepped flow or single tall card. 1. Connect Wallet (MetaMask button). 2. Upload Zone (large dashed area, drag-drop). 3. File Details (Name, Size). 4. Progress Area: Generating SHA-256 Hash -> Simulating Mint -> Completed. Use Framer Motion for step transitions.
register_asset.ui_notes: Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect around the Upload Zone when an upload is active.

verify_ownership.structure: Minimal, focused search UI. Large search input (text-2xl) in the center of the screen: 'Enter File Hash or NFT ID'. On verify: show a sleek card with 'Verified' success state, original timestamp, Owner Wallet, and File Hash. Use mono_label font for data keys.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts: Outfit, Manrope, Azeret Mono.
Install required libraries: lucide-react, framer-motion, ethers (for MetaMask connection).
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (grid, flex), but Shadcn UI for complex components (Dialog, Sheet, Table, Input, Button).
Strictly follow the color hex codes for the Web3 dark cinematic look. Do NOT revert to default gray or slate.
Ensure the hero_background image is used with an overlay (e.g. bg-black/60) so it doesn't distract from text.
MetaMask Connection should be implemented using ethers.js. Display partial wallet address (e.g., 0x1234...ABCD) once connected.
Simulate NFT generation by creating a random hash/ID and setting a timeout to mock network latency, displaying intermediate steps (Hash Generated -> Minting -> Completed).
